posthog.label: PostHog focus
posthog.plan_line: PostHog for product analytics — funnels, retention, HogQL queries, events, and feature flags.
posthog.base_notes: Query insights, trends, funnels, retention, events, persons/cohorts, feature flags, and error tracking via the official PostHog MCP server, plus HogQL/SQL through the query tool. Strong for product-analytics root-cause (why activation or conversion moved). Read-only is enforced by a read-scoped personal API key (see SETUP.md) — the key cannot write, so even the server's create/update/delete tools fail with 403.
